title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
description: Attackers submit large or complex requests to the system, overwhelming its resources (e.g., CPU, memory, bandwidth) and causing a denial of service.
attack_vector: Malformed requests, excessive data uploads, or computationally intensive operations.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests that a user or IP address can make within a given time period.
Validate and sanitize user input to prevent the submission of malicious or oversized requests.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic and reduce the load on the origin server.
